title: Federal Reserve Holds Rates Steady Amid Global Uncertainty
summary: Fed Chair signals patience as inflation remains above target while labor market shows early signs of softening across key sectors.

title: EU Parliament Approves Landmark AI Liability Directive
summary: The sweeping regulation makes it easier for citizens to seek compensation when harmed by AI-powered systems, setting a global benchmark.

title: China and Brazil Sign Landmark Currency Swap Agreement
summary: The deal allows bilateral trade to be settled in yuan and reais, bypassing the US dollar in what analysts call a significant shift in global finance.

title: NATO Summit Ends With Pledge to Boost Defence Spending to 3% of GDP
summary: Member states agree to the highest spending target in the alliance's history amid sustained pressure from the United States.

title: WHO Declares End of Mpox Public Health Emergency of International Concern
summary: The global health body says the outbreak has been brought under sufficient control, though warns vigilance remains essential.
